title: Crystalia Big Banana Case 23cm, 2 Packs, Reusable Premium Quality Protector, 100% BPA-Free Banana Saver Case, Dishwasher Safe, Fruit Keep Fresh Container
features: PROTECT your banana from damage and keep it fresh. Not only you can hold bananas, but you can also hold other small fruits, nuts and vegetables.
PACKAGE INCLUDED: 2 × Banana Holder. Can provide solid protection and convenient storage for fruits and other foods.
PERFECT for on-the-go snacks, brief cases and children's lunch boxes. Suitable for traveling, camping, climbing, school lunches, work commutes and gym visits, and fits comfortably in most bags.
SPECIAL DESIGN: This yellow banana holder box is made of robust plastic. Simply ?snap? your banana inside and it will protect it from knocks and bruises when you?re on the go.
